overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk waterfront promenade at dusk in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a canal under massive overpasses, ascends to a hidden homeless encampment with a campfire and neon-lit food vendor, then exits back down. Features futuristic architecture with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beneath the overpass

entered.detail: calm water canal running parallel to the walkway with reflections of city lights
massive concrete highway structure with multiple levels and support pillars
bright orange safety railing along the canal edge
dark concrete overpass creating overhead cover
row of orange public benches lining the walkway
wooden planter boxes with palm trees and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront promenade with orange benches and planters lining the right side. The canal stretches to the left with an elevated highway ramp visible in the distance, while massive concrete overpass structures loom overhead creating partial cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: stair access plaza with vendor cart

events.description: turns right away from waterfront toward stair ramp area
slows while approaching vendor cart and parked motorcycle

agents.ego_description: turning toward the concrete stair ramp and approaching a small vendor area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside yellow cart with white umbrella
motorcycle parked next to the vendor cart

entered.detail: wide concrete ramp with red trim leading upward
yellow food cart with white umbrella and storage containers
white and black motorcycle parked beside the cart
stack of wooden pallets near the ramp entrance
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Turning right from the waterfront toward a concrete stair ramp. A yellow vendor cart with umbrella and a parked motorcycle occupy the right side near a graffiti-covered wall, while wooden pallets sit near the ramp entrance.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead between the tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up the gravel incline path beneath the massive overpass structure

entered.detail: inclined path covered in loose gravel and dirt
rustic wooden fence lining the left side of the path
tall evergreen tree growing beside the path

segments.scene_description: Ascending a gravel path flanked by wooden fences and concrete walls beneath the overpass. A flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance between the towering structures, and a lone pine tree stands beside the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: homeless encampment with campfire overlooking city

events.description: emerges into upper encampment plaza with burning barrel and city views
approaches tent and food cart area on the left side

agents.ego_description: exploring the encampment area around the campfire with views of the neon city

notable_agents.action: two people warming hands at the burning barrel
person sitting on concrete bench near tent

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside
weathered concrete benches arranged around the plaza
distant futuristic cityscape with glowing neon billboards and towers
green camping tent with supplies nearby
yellow food cart with umbrella visible near the tent area

segments.scene_description: Entering a gravel-floored homeless encampment beneath the overpass with a burning barrel at its center. NPCs gather around the fire for warmth while the neon-lit city skyline glows in the background, and camping tents line the left side near a food cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with neon grill under overpass

events.description: approaches food cart with bright red neon grill illuminating the area
steam rises from the glowing red grill as the vendor tends it

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the food vendor's neon-lit grill setup

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting on stool beside the glowing grill cart

entered.detail: yellow cart with bright red neon grill emitting steam and smoke

segments.scene_description: Approaching a food vendor cart featuring a bright red neon grill emitting steam in the dimly lit corner of the encampment. The vendor sits nearby tending the glowing grill while the surrounding area is bathed in red artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit stairs returning to waterfront level

events.description: descends wooden stairs back toward the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs to exit the encampment area

entered.detail: wooden plank stairs with railings leading downward
view of the canal and waterfront becoming visible again

segments.scene_description: Descending wooden stairs back down from the encampment, with the waterfront canal and overpass structures becoming visible ahead as the player exits the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a structured waterfront promenade up into a hidden urban encampment and back down again. It begins by moving along a covered walkway lined with orange benches and planters beside a canal, before turning right toward a concrete ramp flanked by a yellow vendor cart and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera ascends a gravel path beneath towering overpasses, a flying vehicle passes overhead and a lone pine tree appears, leading the way into a gravel-floored homeless camp centered around a burning barrel and neon-lit skyline. The scene then shifts deeper into the dim corner of the encampment toward a food vendor's bright red neon grill emitting steam, before finally descending a set of wooden stairs to return to the view of the waterfront canal.
